academic_profile: 4.0 unweighted GPA, top 5% of class, strongest student in her bio class per her teacher. No standardized tests yet, PSAT this fall.
academic_strengths: Science, especially biology and environmental science. Strong writer too.
academic_weaknesses: Math is solid but not exceptional. Limited AP options at her school (only 6 offered).
extracurriculars: Started a school recycling program, volunteers at the Urban Ecology Center, works 10 hrs/week at a grocery store, student council
interests: Climate, water quality in Lake Michigan, gardening with her grandmother, wants a career protecting the Great Lakes
personality: Quiet leader. Doesn't seek attention but people follow her. Determined.
teacher_quote: Her bio teacher told us she's the kind of student who makes the whole class better.
relocation: Prefers to stay within a few hours of home
assets: Rent, no significant savings. Small emergency fund.
college_budget: $15,000 per year and that's a stretch
financial_special: Sofia would be the first in the family to attend college.
must_haves: Environmental science or related major, real financial aid
priority_other: Someone mentioned QuestBridge to her counselor. We don't know what it is.
additional_context: I want her to have real options, not just the cheapest one. But I can't co-sign big loans with two more kids coming up behind her.
